name: savecompat-current
description: Deterministic A/START title/intro taps (shared with title-progression) reaching the save-menu entry point with no further input. For a CURRENT SRAM image the compat gate must never activate, so the normal save menu is reached directly -- checkpointed here purely via framebuffer/sram_hash (no raw EWRAM probes, since diagnostic-global addresses are not stable across build configs/ABIs). Both fresh-erase and host-migrated CURRENT images embed this build's live FE8_EXPANSION_BUILD_COMMIT into ExpansionSaveMeta.buildCommitShort (include/save_format.h offset 0x24, 9 bytes) and its dependent checksum (offset 0x2E, 2 bytes) -- intentionally variable across every commit -- so sram_hash_exclude_ranges excludes exactly those two byte ranges (absolute SRAM offsets 29640..29648 and 29650..29651) from this checkpoint's sram_hash, matching docs/save_format.md's normalized-hash policy.
